releaseNotes.headline: Update alerts arrive sooner
releaseNotes.summary: Version 0.2.5 checks for a fresh release when Settings opens and every 30 minutes while usAIge is running.

highlights.title: Fresh every time
highlights.detail: Update checks bypass cached manifests, so a newly published build no longer looks like the installed version.

highlights.title: Check without waiting
highlights.detail: Opening Settings performs an immediate check, and the manual update control remains visible in the Software updates row.
